task_completion.description: Verify the project 'RNA-seq Quality Control Pipeline' is created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the project name 'RNA-seq Quality Control Pipeline' in the SciNote ELN project list, dashboard, or header.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Library QC Assessment' experiment has the correct sequential workflow.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an experiment canvas for 'Library QC Assessment' showing tasks 'RNA Extraction', 'RNA Quality Assessment', 'Library Preparation', and 'Library Quantification' connected by arrows in that exact sequential order.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Bioinformatics Pipeline' experiment has the correct sequential workflow.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an experiment canvas for 'Bioinformatics Pipeline' showing tasks 'Read Trimming', 'Reference Alignment', and 'Expression Quantification' connected by arrows in that exact sequential order.

task_completion.description: Verify a protocol with at least 6 steps is added to the 'Library Preparation' task.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Library Preparation' task details showing a protocol list with at least 6 steps (e.g., fragmentation, first-strand synthesis, second-strand synthesis, end repair, adapter ligation, PCR amplification).

task_completion.description: Verify the inventory 'RNA-seq Reagents' is created with the specified columns.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an inventory table named 'RNA-seq Reagents' containing the custom columns 'Supplier', 'Catalog Number', 'Concentration', and 'Storage Temperature'.

task_completion.description: Verify the specified items are added to the 'RNA-seq Reagents' inventory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for rows in the 'RNA-seq Reagents' inventory table containing the items 'RNeasy Plus Mini Kit', 'KAPA Stranded mRNA-seq Kit', 'ERCC RNA Spike-In Mix', and 'DNase I (RNase-free)'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the SciNote ELN web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser with the SciNote ELN interface, not terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the data was entered into the application normally.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show standard UI elements like forms, canvases, and tables being used, rather than text editors or direct database manipulation.

privileged_info_for_vlm:
Project Name: 'RNA-seq Quality Control Pipeline'
Experiment 1: 'Library QC Assessment' with sequential tasks 'RNA Extraction' -> 'RNA Quality Assessment' -> 'Library Preparation' -> 'Library Quantification'
Experiment 2: 'Bioinformatics Pipeline' with sequential tasks 'Read Trimming' -> 'Reference Alignment' -> 'Expression Quantification'
Protocol: Added to 'Library Preparation' task, containing at least 6 steps.
Inventory Name: 'RNA-seq Reagents'
Inventory Columns: 'Supplier', 'Catalog Number', 'Concentration', 'Storage Temperature'
Inventory Items: 'RNeasy Plus Mini Kit', 'KAPA Stranded mRNA-seq Kit', 'ERCC RNA Spike-In Mix', 'DNase I (RNase-free)'
